label: Check Project Configuration with Template
command: if [ "${PWD##*/}" != "xDO-Template" ]; then cci task run update_qbrix; fi

label: UTILS: 🧰 Generate Brix Validation
UTILS: 🧰 Show Utilities Menu

ORG: 🛠️ Create Development and Test Scratch Orgs
command: qx org create --org dev && qx org create --org qa --set_default false

label: ORG: 🛠️ Create Development and Test SDO Orgs
command: qx org pool --sdo --org qa && qx org pool --sdo --org dev

label: ORG: 🛠️ Create Development and Test CDO Orgs
command: qx org pool --cdo --org qa && qx org pool --cdo --org dev

RETRIEVE: 💾 Retrieve Changes from Salesforce Org

ORG: 🔗 Connect/Reconnect to NextGen DevHub
command: cci service remove devhub default || true && sf org logout -o DevHub --no-prompt || true && qx config sfdx --connect_devhub && sf org list || true && cci service list || true
